segments.text: Good morning, and welcome to the museum - one with a remarkable range of exhibits, which I'm sure you'll enjoy.
segments.translation: 早上好，欢迎来到博物馆，这里有很多很棒的展览，你们一定会喜欢。

segments.text: My name's Greg, and I'll tell you about the various collections as we go round.
segments.translation: 我叫格雷格，我会在参观中为你们介绍这些藏品。

segments.text: But before we go, let me just give you a taste of what we have here.
segments.translation: 在开始之前，我要给你们讲讲这里都有什么。

segments.text: Well, for one thing, we have a fine collection of twentieth and twenty-first century paintings, many by very well-known artists.
segments.translation: 首先，我们这里有很多二十世纪和二十一世纪的画作，很多都是出自大家之手。

segments.text: I'm sure you'll recognise several of the paintings.
segments.translation: 我想你们已经看到一些画作了。

segments.text: This is the gallery that attracts the largest number of visitors, so it's best to go in early in the day, before the crowds arrive.
segments.translation: 这里是最受欢迎的画廊，建议大家在客流量高峰前过来参观。

segments.text: Then there are the nineteenth-century paintings.
segments.translation: 这里是十九世纪的画作。

segments.text: The museum was opened in the middle of that century, and several of the artists each donated one work - to get the museum started, as it were.
segments.translation: 博物馆在这个世纪中期开放的，一些画家捐献了自己的一副作品，为博物馆的开放尽一份力。

segments.text: So they're of special interest to us - we feel closer to them than to other works.
segments.translation: 所以这些画作对我们意义特别，我们感觉它们比其他作品要亲近许多。

segments.text: The sculpture gallery has a number of fine exhibits, but I'm afraid it's currently closed for refurbishment.
segments.translation: 雕塑走廊有很多精致的作品，但是很抱歉近期这里正在装修。

segments.text: You'll need to come back next year to see it properly, but a number of the sculptures have been moved to other parts of the museum.
segments.translation: 你们可以明年来参观它，但有一些雕塑已经安置到了博物馆的其他地方。

segments.text: 'Around the world' is a temporary exhibition - you've probably seen something about it on TV or in the newspapers."
segments.translation: 环游世界”是一个限时展览。你们可能已经在电视或是报纸上看到它的介绍了。

segments.text: It's created a great deal of interest, because it presents objects from every continent and many countries,and provides information about their social context - why they were made, who for, and so on.
segments.translation: 它非常有趣，不仅呈现了世界各地的物品，而且还提供了这些物品的社会背景：因何制作、为谁而作等等。

segments.text: Then there's the collection of coins.
segments.translation: 这里是硬币收藏厅。

segments.text: This is what you might call a focused, specialist collection, because all the coins come from this country, and were produced between two thousand and a thousand years ago.
segments.translation: 你们可能会称它为有针对性的收藏品，因为所有硬币都来自这个城市从两千年前至一千多年前的收藏。

segments.text: And many of them were discovered by ordinary people digging their gardens, and donated to the museum!
segments.translation: 很多由平民在公园挖掘时发现然后捐献到这里的！

segments.text: All our porcelain and glass was left to the museum by its founder, when he died in 1878.
segments.translation: 我们所有的瓷器和玻璃制品都是在1878年，博物馆的创始人去世后留下的。

segments.text: And in the terms of his will, we're not allowed to add anything to that collection: he believed it was perfect in itself, and we don't see any reason to disagree!
segments.translation: 根据他的遗愿，我们不能在这些藏品上添加任何东西，他相信这些藏品本身已经很完美了，而我们也没有理由不赞同他的观点！

segments.text: OK, that was something about the collections, and now here's some more practical information, in case you need it.
segments.translation: 好了，以上是关于藏品的。现在我来告诉大家一些可能会用到的，实用的信息。

segments.text: Most of the museum facilities are downstairs, in the basement, so you go down the stairs here.
segments.translation: 博物馆的很多设施都在地下室，你们可以从这里的楼梯下去。

segments.text: When you reach the bottom of the stairs, you'll find yourself in a sitting area,with comfortable chairs and sofas where you can have a rest before continuing your exploration of the museum.
segments.translation: 当你下到楼梯底部，你会发现你到了一个休憩区，那里有舒适的座椅和沙发，在继续博物馆探索之前，你们可以在那里休息一会。

segments.text: We have a very good restaurant, which serves excellent food all day, in a relaxing atmosphere.
segments.translation: 我们有家很不错的餐厅，每天都会提供轻松氛围和精致美食。

segments.text: To reach it, when you get to the bottom of the stairs, go straight ahead to the far side of the sitting area, then turn right into the corridor.
segments.translation: 如果想去那里，你可以下楼直走到休憩区的对面然后右转进走廊。

segments.text: You'll see the door of the restaurant facing you.
segments.translation: 然后你会看到餐厅的大门正对着你开放。

segments.text: If you just want a snack, or if you'd like to eat somewhere with facilities for children, we also have a café.
segments.translation: 如果你只是想吃点小点心，你可以去儿童区。我们还有咖啡厅。

segments.text: When you reach the bottom of the stairs, you'll need to go straight ahead, turn right into the corridor, and the café is immediately on the right.
segments.translation: 你需要下楼直走右转到走廊，咖啡厅就在右手边。

segments.text: And talking about children, there are baby-changing facilities downstairs: cross the sitting area, continue straight ahead along the corridor on the left, and you and your baby will find the facilities on the left-hand side.
segments.translation: 说到儿童，楼下有个母婴室，下楼穿过休憩区直走到走廊后左转，你和宝宝会在左侧看到那个地方。

segments.text: The cloakroom, where you should leave coats, umbrellas and any large bags, is on the left hand side of the sitting area.
segments.translation: 你可以将大衣、雨伞或是大件行李物品存放到衣帽间。它就在休憩区的左手边。

segments.text: It's through the last door before you come to the corridor.
segments.translation: 它在到达走廊之前的最后一道门后面。

segments.text: There are toilets on every floor, but in the basement they're the first rooms on the left when you get down there.
segments.translation: 每层都有卫生间，但是地下室的卫生间是在一下楼左手边的第一个房间。

segments.text: OK, now if you've got anything to leave in the cloakroom, please do that now, and then we'll start our tour.
segments.translation: 好了，现在如果有人想去衣帽间存放物品，请现在就去吧。稍后我们就要开始参观了。
